notes: Edge-traced rendering of the photo that drops one squid and omits the arm crown/tentacles entirely, with noisy interior clutter rather than restrained FAO stipple.
specific_issues: only three squid rendered, photo shows four
arms and tentacles entirely missing — right ends are blunt rounded stubs
interior marks read as edge-detection noise, not chromatophore stipple
fin outlines weakly resolved into the mantle silhouette
broken/dotted segments along outlines instead of continuous single-weight contour
eyes drawn but disconnected from any head structure
overall reads as photo edge-trace, not scientific plate
